text:
AI agents are distributed systems.
Treat them accordingly.

CORE TAKEAWAYS
Reliability is no longer a model problem—it is an infrastructure.
Multidimensional observability is mandatory, not optional.
Agent control planes are the required runtime layer for production AI.

The future of AI won’t be won by better prompts.
It will be won by better systems.
